title: scope-of-work model structures deliverables and milestones
content:
# scope-of-work model structures deliverables and milestones

`powerhouse/scope-of-work` (33 ops) is the third-largest model by operation count. Structures project deliverables, milestones, timelines, and budget allocations. Part of the Work Management zone.

## Cross-Model References

- May reference [[builder-profile model describes individual contributor identities]] for assignees
- May feed into [[invoice model generates formal payment requests]] for milestone-based billing
- Related to [[request-for-proposals model manages procurement workflows]] (RFP → awarded SoW)
- [[workstream model organizes ongoing work streams]] may group multiple scopes

## Position in Ecosystem

Work Management zone. High operation count (33) suggests complex deliverable management with nested line items.

---

description: 33 operations (third largest) — defines project scopes with deliverables, milestones, budgets, and acceptance criteria
